headline: Top 10 Stock Market Moving Headlines From Last Week: Peloton Transition, Disney Earnings, Crypto Ads, SpaceX Event And More
summary:
Every day, Benzinga TV covers the biggest topics of the stock market. Benzinga’s new weekly highlights show features the top 10 events of the previous week.

Follow Benzinga on YouTube for daily shows committed to providing the best market news and commentary.

headline: Stocks To Watch: 10 Public Companies With Super Bowl LVI Commercials

headline: It Won't Be The Same Tesla In The Future: Elon Musk And Others Weigh In
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has a thriving EV manufacturing business, thanks to CEO  Elon Musk's  vision and its early mover advantage. Indications from the Tesla chief suggest that a few years from now, the company may not look anything like it currently does.

summary: Super Bowl LVI kicks off at 6:30 p.m. EST and brings with it one of the most bet upon sporting events in the world. Here’s a look at how the sports betting market is shaping up for the game and some key bets to consider.

headline: Why Is Apple Hiking Pay For Its Retail Store Employees?
summary: Apple Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) retail store workers are in for a windfall, as Cupertino is reportedly raising pay for them.

headline: EV Week In Review: Musk Finally Gets Biden's Mention, XPeng Zooms Into More European Markets Ahead Of Nio, Ford Ropes In Another Tesla Executive And More
summary: EV stocks closed the week ending Feb. 11 on a mixed note amid the broader market volatility. Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) continued to be haunted by recalls, but CEO Elon Musk  scored a victory in his pursuit of an endorsement from President Joe Biden.
